auth.login.title: Welcome back
auth.login.subtitle: Sign in to your clinic portal
auth.login.phone.label: Mobile Number
auth.login.otp.label: Enter OTP
auth.login.error.invalid-phone: Enter a valid 10-digit Indian mobile number
auth.login.error.locked: Too many attempts. Try again in {minutes} minutes.
auth.login.error.expired: OTP expired. Please request a new code.
auth.login.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

common.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.error.unauthorized: You don't have permission to do this.
common.error.not-found: The requested resource was not found.

staff.title: Staff Management
staff.invite-limit-reached: You've reached your Doctor limit on the {plan} plan. Upgrade to add more Doctors.
staff.remove-confirm: Remove {name} from {clinic}? They will lose access immediately.
staff.invite-expired: This invitation has expired. Ask your Clinic Owner to resend it.

settings.title: Settings
settings.clinic-slug-locked: Contact support to change your booking URL.

onboarding.step1.title: Let's set up your clinic
onboarding.step1.subtitle: Tell us about your practice. This takes less than 2 minutes.
onboarding.step1.slug-locked: Slug cannot be changed after first save.
onboarding.step1.legal-intro: Before we start, please review and accept these agreements. They protect both you and your patients.
onboarding.step1.legal-tos: I have read and accept the Terms of Service
onboarding.step1.legal-privacy: I have read and accept the Privacy Policy
onboarding.step1.legal-dpa: I accept the Data Processing Agreement as a Data Fiduciary under the DPDP Act 2023
onboarding.step2.title: Add your first doctor
onboarding.step2.subtitle: You can add more doctors later from Settings.
onboarding.step3.title: Set working hours
onboarding.step3.subtitle: Set when your clinic is open for appointments.
onboarding.step4.title: Connect WhatsApp Business
onboarding.step4.subtitle: Send appointment reminders and confirmations via WhatsApp.
onboarding.complete.title: You're all set!
onboarding.complete.subtitle: Your clinic is ready. Let's look at a sample appointment.
onboarding.error.slug-invalid: Slug must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
onboarding.error.legal-required: Please accept all three agreements to continue
onboarding.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
onboarding.error.fee-invalid: Fee must be a positive number
